description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a default image of node:22-bullseye, interruptible jobs, and the saas-linux-small-amd64 tag, defining variables like DEFAULT_NODE_VERSION and LINUX_DISTRO. In the test stage, define a .npm template that prints OS and Node version, runs npm ci --quiet, caches .cache/npm (pull policy), and executes npm test; then add three concrete jobs: test:node-18-linux uses the node:18-bullseye image and inherits the .npm script, test:node-22-linux overrides the script to npm run coverage, adds always‑uploaded artifacts (lcov-report, cobertura‑coverage.xml, tests-xunit.xml) and extracts coverage with a regex, and test:windows runs on a Windows runner (tag opendevise-hq-windows) with pull‑push cache, runs npm run coverage, and uploads the same artifacts. Add a docs job in the test stage that only runs on merge‑request events where the source branch matches ^docs/ and echoes "we love docs!". Add a lint job in a custom .pre stage that extends .npm, uses a pull‑push cache, sets NPM_CONFIG_AUDIT=true, runs npm run tidy, npm pkg fix --workspaces --include-workspace-root, fails if any git diff is present, then runs npm run coverage -- --version; it is manual on push for non‑antora projects, otherwise runs on_success, and never runs for docs merge requests. Finally, add a release job in the deploy stage, non‑interruptible, that runs only on protected web pipelines with a RELEASE_VERSION, downloads and executes a release script, sources releaserc, and triggers a downstream Docker image pipeline via a curl POST using CI_JOB_TOKEN.
